title: Child Care Premise and Family Day Care

key_provisions.heading: 1.0 Locations
key_provisions.summary: 1.1 In accordance with Table 3-Zoning Table Clause 17 of LPS 6, Child Care Premises

key_provisions.heading: 2.0 Siting and Design
key_provisions.summary: 2.1 Where a Child Care Premises is located in a Centre, Mixed Use, Service Commercial

key_provisions.heading: 3.0 Noise and Amenity
key_provisions.summary: 3.1 Where a Child Care Premises is proposed to be located adjacent to residential

key_provisions.heading: 4.0 Landscaping
key_provisions.summary: 4.1 A landscaping plan detailing all hard and soft landscaping, including shade structures

key_provisions.heading: 5.0 Car Parking and Traffic Generation
key_provisions.summary: 5.1 Car parking shall be provided in accordance with Local Planning Policy LPP1.6 Car

key_provisions.heading: 6.0 Hours of Operation
key_provisions.summary: 6.1 Where a Child Care Premises is located adjacent to a property used for residential

key_provisions.heading: 7.0 Signage
key_provisions.summary: 7.1 The City’s requirements for advertising and signage are outlined in Local Planning

key_provisions.heading: REVIEWS
key_provisions.summary: Special Planning and Development Services Committee 27/06/2000 P00/1004

cross_references: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015
